summary: Iteration 94 - Solomon AI Deliverable Generation (PDF/PPTX/DOCX/XLSX) and Custom Report Builder Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - Custom Report Builder page loads with 7 templates, 5-step wizard works, and all 5 export buttons (CSV, PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX) are present. Landing page hero section verified - no God Mode KPI screenshot.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deliverable generation and Custom Report Builder fully working. All 4 document formats (PDF, PPTX, DOCX, XLSX) generate correctly with proper content-types and file sizes. Custom Report Builder at /reports/builder shows 7 quick-start templates, supports 5 data sources (people, donations, attendance, groups, checkins), and has all 5 export buttons. Landing page hero section is clean with no God Mode KPI screenshot.

pptx_generation.details: POST /api/solomon/generate-deliverable with type=pptx returns PPTX file >20KB

docx_generation.details: POST /api/solomon/generate-deliverable with type=docx returns DOCX file >5KB

xlsx_generation.details: POST /api/solomon/generate-deliverable with type=xlsx returns XLSX file >3KB

deliverable_with_table_data.details: PDF/DOCX/XLSX correctly include table rows from table_data parameter

deliverable_with_sections.details: PPTX/DOCX correctly create separate sections/slides from sections parameter

custom_report_preview.details: POST /api/admin/reports/custom/preview returns columns, rows, total_count from real database

custom_report_save.details: POST /api/admin/reports/custom saves report config and returns report object with ID

frontend_report_builder_page.details: /reports/builder page shows 7 quick-start templates and 5-step wizard

frontend_export_buttons.details: Report preview step shows all 5 export buttons: CSV, PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX

landing_page_hero.details: Hero section does NOT show God Mode KPI screenshot (removed per user request)

mocked_apis.solomon_pay: Solomon Pay processor is MOCKED for demo mode
